name: smolagents-ejentum
summary: smolagents Tool subclasses for the Ejentum Reasoning Harness. Four tools (harness_reasoning, harness_code, harness_anti_deception, harness_memory) an agent calls before generating. Each call returns a task-matched cognitive operation engineered in two layers: a natural-language procedure plus an executable reasoning topology (graph DAG with gates, parallel branches, and meta-cognitive exits).
